module_sme_rollup.name: Asset Foundation & Registry
module_sme_rollup.description: Establish complete asset identification, classification, and hierarchical organization with full lifecycle tracking.

statements.text: Generate unique asset identifiers with barcode/RFID and organize in hierarchical structure by ownership and dependencies.
statements.rationale: Core asset identification and structure

statements.text: Classify assets by category, class, criticality, and record technical specs including serial, make, model, manufacturer.
statements.rationale: Enable asset differentiation and maintenance planning

statements.text: Track current custodian, physical location, status, and lifecycle data for all assets with audit trail.
statements.rationale: Ensure accountability and operational visibility

statements.text: Maintain asset states: planned, in-service, idle, under-repair, disposed with commissioning and transfer logs.
statements.rationale: Support lifecycle transitions and compliance

statements.text: Link warranty, service contracts, manuals, and certificates to each asset record with expiry tracking.
statements.rationale: Centralize asset support documentation

statements.text: Auto-create asset records from purchase documents and support reinstatement after refurbishment.
statements.rationale: Reduce manual data entry and enable asset recovery

module_sme_rollup.name: Maintenance Planning & Execution
module_sme_rollup.description: Schedule preventive and corrective maintenance, manage work orders, and track technician execution with full visibility.

statements.text: Auto-generate work orders from preventive maintenance plans triggered by time, usage, or sensor thresholds.
statements.rationale: Eliminate manual scheduling and reduce reactive maintenance

statements.text: Define maintenance schedules by interval (daily, weekly, monthly, quarterly, annual, custom) with reusable templates.
statements.rationale: Standardize and scale maintenance planning

statements.text: Create work orders for corrective, preventive, inspection, and project maintenance with approval workflows.
statements.rationale: Control maintenance scope and authorization

statements.text: Assign work orders to technicians, track progress, record labour time, and capture failure codes and root causes.
statements.rationale: Enable execution visibility and post-maintenance analysis

statements.text: Execute task-level checklists with pass/fail validation and digital signatures during work order closure.
statements.rationale: Ensure quality and compliance documentation

statements.text: Non-maintenance users submit service requests via portal; authorized staff triage and convert to work orders.
statements.rationale: Democratize maintenance requests and improve response

module_sme_rollup.name: Spare Parts & Inventory Management
module_sme_rollup.description: Maintain spare parts catalogue, track inventory across locations, and link consumption to maintenance activities.

statements.text: Maintain spare parts catalogue with alternate and substitute parts linked to asset classes and work orders.
statements.rationale: Enable flexible parts sourcing and reduce downtime

statements.text: Track spare parts across multiple storerooms with bin-level precision and automatic reorder alerts.
statements.rationale: Prevent stockouts and optimize inventory levels

statements.text: Reserve spare parts against planned work orders and issue directly from inventory with traceability.
statements.rationale: Ensure parts availability and track consumption per asset

statements.text: Generate replenishment purchase requisitions automatically based on stock thresholds and consumption history.
statements.rationale: Automate procurement and reduce manual ordering

statements.text: Track lot and serial numbers for spare parts and link to assets for traceability and recall management.
statements.rationale: Enable product recall and warranty claim support

module_sme_rollup.name: Financial Management & Compliance
module_sme_rollup.description: Calculate depreciation, manage asset valuation, track leases, and ensure regulatory and safety compliance.

statements.text: Support multiple depreciation methods (straight-line, declining balance) with separate book and tax schedules.
statements.rationale: Meet accounting standards and tax requirements

statements.text: Auto-post depreciation entries to general ledger at period close with daily pro-rata calculations.
statements.rationale: Ensure accurate financial reporting and audit trail

statements.text: Record asset impairment, revaluation, and accumulated depreciation by asset, class, and cost center.
statements.rationale: Support financial statement accuracy and variance analysis

statements.text: Accumulate capital project costs before capitalization; capitalize sub-assets as they enter service.
statements.rationale: Align asset recognition with operational readiness

statements.text: Maintain lease register with automatic right-of-use asset and liability calculation on commencement.
statements.rationale: Comply with IFRS 16 and lease accounting standards

statements.text: Schedule inspections by regulatory frequency; maintain certificate registry with expiry alerts and audit trail.
statements.rationale: Prevent compliance violations and regulatory penalties

statements.text: Execute inspection checklists, record pass/fail outcomes, and track remedial actions with evidence.
statements.rationale: Document compliance and support regulatory audits

module_sme_rollup.name: Monitoring, Analytics & Field Operations
module_sme_rollup.description: Capture condition data, analyze maintenance performance, and enable mobile field work with offline capability.

statements.text: Capture asset condition data from manual entry, barcode scanning, and IoT sensors with threshold-based alerts.
statements.rationale: Enable predictive maintenance and early failure detection

statements.text: Display trend charts and historical analysis of vibration, temperature, pressure, and flow measurements.
statements.rationale: Support condition-based maintenance decisions

statements.text: Calculate and report MTBF, MTTR, OEE, and maintenance cost breakdown by labour, parts, and contractors.
statements.rationale: Measure maintenance effectiveness and identify improvement areas

statements.text: Report preventive maintenance compliance, backlog, and downtime analysis by failure code and root cause.
statements.rationale: Identify patterns and prioritize corrective actions

statements.text: Barcode/QR scanning, offline work order execution, photo capture, and GPS location stamping on mobile.
statements.rationale: Enable field technicians to work efficiently with full documentation

statements.text: Mobile app for iOS/Android with offline sync, task checklists, and digital signatures for audit compliance.
statements.rationale: Support disconnected field operations and reduce data entry errors

module_sme_rollup.name: Integration, Security & Governance
module_sme_rollup.description: Integrate with enterprise systems, enforce data security, and maintain audit compliance across all operations.

statements.text: Import asset registers from CSV/Excel; export asset, work order, and spare parts data to standard formats.
statements.rationale: Enable data migration and reporting flexibility

statements.text: Integrate with accounting systems for depreciation posting and procurement systems for purchase orders.
statements.rationale: Eliminate manual data transfer and ensure consistency

statements.text: Encrypt asset and maintenance data at rest and in transit; maintain immutable audit trail of all changes.
statements.rationale: Protect sensitive data and meet security compliance

statements.text: Implement role-based access control by asset location, department, or cost centre with two-factor authentication.
statements.rationale: Restrict unauthorized access and enforce accountability

statements.text: Support data deletion, anonymization, and retention policies for PDPA compliance and PSG Cyber Essentials.
statements.rationale: Meet privacy regulations and security baseline standards

statements.text: Provide RESTful API for custom integrations; schedule automated backups and exports for business continuity.
statements.rationale: Enable extensibility and protect against data loss

Platform & Data.narrative: This family ensures your asset data is accessible, secure, and connected across your organisation. Your maintenance teams need to access asset information from the field on their phones, your finance team needs to pull depreciation data, and you must comply with Singapore's PDPA regulations. Without solid platform foundations, you'll struggle to scale beyond spreadsheets and risk data breaches or audit failures.

Asset Register & Lifecycle.narrative: A centralised asset register is the backbone of asset management — it tells you what you own, where it is, what it cost, and how much it's worth on your balance sheet. Singapore SMEs need this to satisfy tax authorities on depreciation claims, manage insurance valuations, and avoid losing track of expensive equipment. Without it, you're flying blind on asset costs and compliance.

Maintenance Operations.narrative: This family turns maintenance from reactive firefighting into planned, efficient work. By scheduling preventive maintenance, managing work orders, and tracking spare parts, you reduce unexpected downtime, extend asset life, and control costs. A manufacturing SME that prevents a production line failure saves thousands in lost revenue; a facilities manager that plans maintenance windows avoids disrupting tenants.

Reliability & Compliance.narrative: Regulatory inspections, safety certifications, and equipment health checks are non-negotiable in Singapore — especially in food, healthcare, and industrial sectors. This family ensures you capture inspection records, track compliance deadlines, and respond to early warning signs before equipment fails or regulators fine you. It's the difference between passing an audit smoothly and scrambling to prove you maintain your assets.

Capital & Commercial.narrative: When you buy new equipment or take out a service contract, you need to link that purchase to your asset register and track warranty coverage so repairs go to the right vendor. If you lease equipment to customers, you must track uptime commitments. This family bridges capital projects and day-to-day operations, ensuring new assets are properly commissioned and commercial obligations are met.

Analytics & Intelligence.narrative: Dashboards and KPIs on maintenance performance help you spot trends — which assets fail most often, which technicians are most efficient, where you're overspending on repairs. A Singapore SME that monitors these metrics can shift from reactive to predictive maintenance and justify investment in new equipment based on real data rather than guesswork.
